overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along a winding coastal highway with palm trees and a futuristic cityscape. The player navigates through moderate traffic while a massive tower structure dominates the left side of the initial view, transitioning to an open vista of the distant industrial city.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with palm tree landscaping

events.description: police car passes in the opposite direction on the left
road curves gently to the right while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: driving along the curved highway, maintaining steady speed with traffic flow

notable_agents.action: police car driving in opposite direction passes by closely
black car ahead on the road moving in same direction

entered.detail: massive tall white tower structure with multiple platforms rising from the hillside
cluster of green palm trees lining the left side of the highway
silver metal guardrail running along the left edge of the road
faint outline of city buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Driving along a sunlit multi-lane highway bordered by palm trees and a grassy hillside. A massive futuristic tower dominates the left skyline while vehicles pass by in both directions, including a police car that passes closely on the left.

events.description: purple sedan overtakes the player vehicle on the right side
futuristic tower moves out of direct view as cityscape becomes prominent on right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding uphill road, navigating past slower traffic

notable_agents.action: purple sedan overtaking the player on the right at high speed

entered.detail: distant futuristic cityscape with multiple high-rise buildings becoming visible
contemporary structures visible on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The road continues curving uphill as the massive tower recedes from view behind the vehicle. A purple sedan overtakes on the right, and the distant city skyline becomes increasingly visible on the horizon while modern buildings appear on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic industrial view

events.description: increased sun glare as camera faces more directly toward the sun
heavy traffic passes by with multiple vehicles overtaking in quick succession

agents.ego_description: ascending the hill with increased sun glare, navigating through heavier traffic flow

notable_agents.action: red sports car speeding past in the opposite direction
large truck passing in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large industrial buildings and smokestacks visible in the distant city
modern curved street light poles lining the highway

segments.scene_description: Ascending the elevated highway with bright sun glare, the landscape becomes drier with sparse vegetation. Heavy traffic passes by in both directions including sports cars and trucks, while the industrial cityscape grows more prominent on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway crest with industrial zone overlook

events.description: slight turn to the right as the road curves along the hilltop
black sedan overtakes the player vehicle on the left

agents.ego_description: cresting the hill with a clear view of the industrial district, maintaining position on the right side of the road

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side of the road

entered.detail: guardrail now visible on the right side as the road curves
tall industrial chimneys and processing towers in the distance

segments.scene_description: Cresting the highway hill with expansive views of the industrial cityscape on the right. The road continues with guardrails on both sides as vehicles pass by, and the terrain shows dry grass and scattered bushes with the city skyline stretching into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a sunlit coastal highway that transitions from the shadow of a massive tower into an expansive vista of a distant industrial city. It begins on a multi-lane road bordered by palm trees and a grassy hillside, where a towering futuristic structure dominates the left skyline as a police car speeds past. As the road curves uphill, the tower recedes from view and the horizon opens up, revealing a growing city skyline while a purple sedan overtakes on the right. The scene then shifts toward a drier landscape with sparse vegetation and bright sun glare, moving through heavy traffic of sports cars and trucks as the industrial cityscape becomes more prominent. Finally, the camera crests the highway hill to reveal a wide, panoramic view of the sprawling city stretching across the right horizon beyond the guardrails and dry brush.
